title: The AI race just moved from training → inference
author: topicspace
selftext:
**The AI narrative is shifting — quietly but clearly.**

• OpenAI is sourcing inference chips directly (Broadcom)  
• Nvidia is calling an “inflection point of inference”  
• Google dropped 8× faster, 6× lighter inference  
• Meta is pivoting from research → execution

This isn’t about better models anymore.

It’s about **who can run them at scale.**
